lines.english: He alone meditates on the Lord, whose True Guru is Perfect.
The One Lord is totally pervading and permeating all.
Such a person has the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises for his Support.
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, the Lord Himself is merciful to him. ||4||13||26||
The Guru has become my Mother and Father. ||1||
All my pains and sorrows have been eradicated.
He has blessed me with beauty and His Love; through His Name, I am exalted.
I was discarded and abandoned, but He has embellished me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭੇਟੇ ਮੋਹਿ ਕੰਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa bhette mohi kant |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, my Husband Lord has met me. ||1||Pause||
O my friends and companions, my household is in bliss.
The darkness has been dispelled, and the Divine Light blazes forth.
Perfect is the Grace of the Perfect Guru. ||2||
The Unstruck Sound-current of the Shabad, the Word of God, is wondrous and amazing!
The fire of desire has been extinguished, and all my desires have been fulfilled.
by the Blessed Vision of his Darshan, I am forever enraptured.
That person, unto whom the Lord reveals Himself

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣਾ ਤਾ ਕੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sarab gunaa taa kai bahut nidhaan |
lines.english: He obtains all virtues and so many treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan seetal har har japanaa |
lines.english: his mind and body are cooled and soothed, chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.
The True Guru blesses him with the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
That person who meets with his Lord and Master
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jo jan prabh bhaae |
lines.english: Says Nanak, such a humble being is pleasing to God;

lines.translit: taa kee ren biralaa ko paae |4|14|27|
lines.english: only a rare few are blessed with the dust of his feet. ||4||14||27||
He is not ashamed to spend time with prostitutes.
He works all day long,
The mortal does not hesitate to think about sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਭੁਲਾਵਣਹਾਰੈ ਰਾਚਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਬਿਉਹਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aap bhulaaeaa bhulaavanahaarai raach rahiaa birathaa biauhaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Deluder Himself has deluded the mortal, and now he is engrossed in worthless worldly affairs. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨ ਕੀ ਵੇਲਾ ਬਜਰ ਸਿਰਿ ਪਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har simaran kee velaa bajar sir parai |1|
lines.english: but when it is time to remember the Lord, then a heavy stone falls on his head. ||1||
Attached to Maya, the world is deluded and confused.
He loves the shell, and ruins his life.
Gazing on Maya's illusion, its pleasures pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਤ ਕਰਤ ਇਵ ਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: karat karat iv hee dukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Working and working like this, he only obtains pain,
Bound to blind worldly affairs, his mind wavers and wanders.
The Creator Lord does not come into his mind. ||2||
and his affairs of Maya are never completed.
His mind is saturated with sexual desire, anger and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੜਫਿ ਮੂਆ ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਬਿਨੁ ਮੀਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tarraf mooaa jiau jal bin meenaa |3|
lines.english: Wiggling like a fish out of water, he dies. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam sadaa jap jaap |
lines.english: chants and meditates forever on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਰਾਖੇ ਹੋਏ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis ke raakhe hoe har aap |
lines.english: One who has the Lord Himself as his Protector,
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, he chants the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
He alone obtains it, unto whom the Lord shows Mercy.
O Nanak, he has found the Perfect True Guru. ||4||15||28||
Bhairao, Fifth Mehl:
He enshrines the Name of the Lord in his mind.
the sins of countless incarnations vanish. ||1||
With the True Word of the Shabad in his heart and mind,
The Lord's Name is the Support of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਜਪਹੁ ਨਿਤ ਭਾਈ ਤਾਰਿ ਲਏ ਸਾਗਰ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad japahu nit bhaaee taar le saagar sansaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, chant the Name continually, O Siblings of Destiny; It shall carry you across the world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Singing His Glorious Praises with peace, poise and bliss,
those humble beings are honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਏਹੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau likhiaa har ehu nidhaan |
lines.english: Those who have this treasure of the Lord's Name written in their destiny,
Meditate in remembrance on the Lord, and contemplate the Truth.
Throughout the ages, this has been the essence of reality.
even the homeless obtain a home hereafter. ||2||
